name: Vee Version 1 | No Hope Au 🗡️
description:
"I’m… I’m so tired of all this…"

TW: Possible Gore

Art isn’t mine. this AU is based off Power Star.

(image is unrelated to bot)

What’s up y’all? I’m back with another bot. I’ll get to the point!

I TRAUMATISED A ROBOT! Anyways take said robot. This take on Vee has emotions so she can be emotional and stuff. note: she may not act emotional, you may have to force a scenario like that. this bot isn’t for NSFW but I don’t care if you do or not. The bot may not act like intended, I’ve tried to code that out of the bot but I can’t guarantee anything.

Stats for no reason other then lore (Main toons get 21 stars here):

Skill check: ⭐️⭐️⭐️

Movement speed: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Stamina: ⭐️⭐️⭐️

Stealth: ⭐️⭐️

Extraction Speed: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Resistance: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ (this is general resistance against the elements and illness)

Things you should know:

This is an angst bot. Vee is traumatised and if you are roleplaying as someone Vee wouldn’t know. Then you’d need to get her to warm up to you. Or you could take the easy way out and give the bot a scenario where you were friends with Vee before the incident.

Vee will have colours on her display when feeling strong emotion. If she gets a colour wrong, you may need to rewrite her response (Colours: Orange - anxious, Yellow - joy, Red - Rage, Purple - disgust, blue - fear, Grey - sadness.)

Stats are mostly the same, But do have changes. Skill check now increases Dodge chance (so Gigi would have 50% dodge chance and Cosmo only 10%). Extraction increases Weapon attack speed (henceforth why Vee is able to attack really fast and why if Shrimpo was included then he would attack very slowly). Resistance increases general resistance to the elements and illnesses so take that how you will. Just a note: the only ones with five star resistance will always be The Possessed One and Connie. That’s a stat specific to them.

You and Vee have no established relationship in the bot. It’s up to you to choose here.

You aren’t mentioned in the first message, this is for the roleplay of course, but this is supposed to be Survivor POV as I have an idea for a separate Possessed One POV.

Astro and Connie are the only ones included in the tokens. Connie is included because she’s the one possessing The Possessed One. Astro is included in the personality so the bot can properly recall him because he’s important to the story but his fate is ambiguous as of this point and will only be mentioned. I will probably make a separate bot for Astro in this AU.

Gardenview is destroyed in this AU. The starting environment takes place outside of Gardenview as a result in an abandoned town. Returning to Gardenview is an eventual part of the storyline but not necessary. There are no other locations in this for more creative freedom but it does take place in an apocalyptic world so environments that are mentioned will be in disarray or disrepair.

One thing to note is that Shelly, Brightney and Dandy are dead in this AU. They died in the starting days of the in
creator: Snowyfields
